title: centella glabrata
intro: Centella glabrata, also known as Marsh Pennywort or Swamp Pennywort, is a perennial aquatic plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centella glabrata are attributed to its ability to improve cardiovascular health, boost cognitive function, and support skin health, as well as its potential to treat various conditions such as arthritis and Alzheimer's disease. Centella glabrata is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as soups and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
